name: animal-escape
description: A cozy, mobile-first 3D dice-rolling board game built with BabylonJS.

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html app.js styles.css www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
